strengths: TypeScript and Node.js expertise well-demonstrated across multiple senior production roles
Full-stack capability proven across web, mobile, and infrastructure work with diverse technical domains
Consistent emphasis on code quality, testing practices, and clean architecture throughout career
concerns: Currently Staff-level engineer applying for junior/mid-level position—career regression creates acute retention risk
No React or Nest.js experience documented; background emphasizes Ember.js, which does not address core tech requirements
PostgreSQL relational database work not explicit; resume highlights MongoDB, systems programming, and infrastructure over domain application development

key_factors.factor: PostgreSQL relational database expertise not demonstrated

response.justification: A Staff engineer regressing to an entry-level individual-contributor role raises immediate retention concerns and questions about motivation. Beyond seniority, the candidate lacks both React and Nest.js despite their being core requirements—Ember.js background is not equivalent. PostgreSQL relational-database work, emphasized in the job, is absent from a career focused on MongoDB, infrastructure, and systems programming. While technically accomplished, the specific fit for pragmatic fullstack product development in energy/construction is weak, and compensation/growth expectations will likely misalign.
